task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Vcomb.fits image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vcomb.fits image window is visible within an image processing application (e.g., ImageJ/Fiji).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated background subtraction with a rolling ball radius of 15.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Subtract Background' dialog box is visible with the 'Rolling ball radius' explicitly set to 15.0 pixels.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the resulting flattened image to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing 'm12_flattened.fits' being saved to or existing in the '~/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent measured the statistics of the flattened image, including the Mean.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Results' or 'Measurements' window is visible showing statistics for the image, specifically including a column for 'Mean'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the measurement results to a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing 'measurements.csv' being saved to or existing in the '~/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the image processing software GUI rather than terminal commands to generate dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GUI of an image processing application (like ImageJ/Fiji) with the image loaded and dialogs open, not just terminal windows or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the measurements table contains actual calculated values rather than being manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Results window is a native component of the image processing software, populated with numerical data, rather than a manually created spreadsheet or text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the files in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or file explorer windows clearly show the path '/home/ga/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/' when saving the FITS and CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use a rolling ball radius of exactly 15.0 for the background subtraction. The output FITS file must be saved to '/home/ga/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/m12_flattened.fits'. The measurement results must be saved to '/home/ga/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/measurements.csv' and must include the Mean pixel value.
